3.1 Premature Termination: The process completed after verification, so no premature end.

3.2 Weak Verification: The Verifier checked both agents' conclusions and confirmed consistency. Verification was thorough.

3.3 No or Incorrect Verification: Verification was done correctly, so no.

The task was successfully completed. The summary would note that all agents collaborated effectively without any failure modes.
